decision.context: Default secret_key only warned, did not block startup
decision.decision: Change warning to ValueError — app refuses to start with default key
decision.rationale: Production systems must never ship with default secrets, even with warnings

decision.context: Fernet encryption key derived from JWT secret — single point of compromise
decision.decision: Require explicit DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY env var, remove fallback derivation
decision.rationale: Cryptographic separation of concerns — JWT compromise should not expose encrypted data

decision.context: admin_users_router list_users had admin: CurrentAdmin = None, bypassing auth
decision.decision: Replace = None with Depends() to enforce authentication
decision.rationale: Default None overrides FastAPI Depends(), allowing unauthenticated access to admin endpoint

decision.context: Deploy scripts used sshpass with passwords visible in ps aux
decision.decision: Remove all sshpass usage, require SSH key-based authentication
decision.rationale: Password-based SSH in scripts exposes credentials to process listing and shell history

decision.context: install.sh used base64 encoding as "encryption" for secrets
decision.decision: Remove base64 encoding, pass secrets as plain env vars through SSH
decision.rationale: Base64 is encoding, not encryption — provides false sense of security

decision.context: deploy-on-server.sh wrote admin credentials to /root/.krotpn-admin-credentials
decision.decision: Remove plaintext credential file creation entirely
decision.rationale: Credentials on disk are a persistent attack surface; install.sh already shows them interactively

decision.context: Production server IPs hardcoded in deploy scripts and .env.production
decision.decision: Replace all hardcoded IPs with env vars, add to .gitignore
decision.rationale: Infrastructure IPs in VCS are information disclosure and create deployment coupling

decision.context: Backend API port 8000 exposed externally via docker-compose port mapping
decision.decision: Remove 8000:8000 mapping, backend accessible only via nginx proxy
decision.rationale: Direct API access bypasses nginx security headers, rate limiting, and SSL termination

decision.context: datetime.utcnow() used in 40+ locations, deprecated in Python 3.12+
decision.decision: Replace all datetime.utcnow() with datetime.now(timezone.utc)
decision.rationale: utcnow() returns naive datetime, causing timezone comparison bugs and deprecation warnings

decision.context: No Alembic migrations — database schema managed by SQLModel.metadata.create_all on startup
decision.decision: Initialize Alembic with async support and generate initial baseline migration
decision.rationale: Schema changes in production require migration tracking, not ad-hoc create_all

decision.context: No token revocation — compromised tokens valid until expiry
decision.decision: Add Redis-based token blacklist with blacklist_token() and is_token_blacklisted()
decision.rationale: Token revocation is essential for logout security and incident response

decision.context: _reprovision_client created new WG peer but never removed the old one
decision.decision: Capture old public key before generating new keys, call wg_manager.remove_peer() after adding new peer
decision.rationale: Orphaned peers remain connected and consume server resources

decision.context: server.current_clients counter not decremented on subscription expiry
decision.decision: Decrement current_clients with floor-at-zero guard after client deactivation
decision.rationale: Counter drift causes incorrect capacity reporting and potential over-provisioning

decision.context: _get_or_provision_user_client returned None on errors, producing silent 404s
decision.decision: Re-raise DeviceLimitExceededError as HTTP 409, ValueError as HTTP 400
decision.rationale: Clients need actionable error messages, not generic 404s

decision.context: Circular dependencies between vpn, routing, billing, devices modules
decision.decision: Document known dependency chains in app/core/__init__.py, defer full refactoring
decision.rationale: Full decoupling requires significant architecture change; documentation is the safe first step

decision.context: database.py was 1068 lines, mixing engine setup with migration logic
decision.decision: Split into database.py (88 lines) + migrations.py (987 lines)
decision.rationale: Single Responsibility Principle — connection management and migrations are separate concerns

decision.context: Auth tokens stored in localStorage, vulnerable to XSS
decision.decision: Add httpOnly secure cookies alongside Bearer token responses for backward compatibility
decision.rationale: httpOnly cookies are inaccessible to JavaScript, eliminating XSS token theft vector

decision.context: Refresh token interceptor used bare axios.post() instead of configured instance
decision.decision: Use axios.create({ baseURL }) for refresh calls to avoid interceptor loops
decision.rationale: Bare axios bypasses base URL config and may cause infinite refresh loops

decision.context: 53 any usages in admin frontend — zero type safety for CRUD operations
decision.decision: Create 18 typed interfaces in types/index.ts, eliminate all any usages
decision.rationale: TypeScript without types is JavaScript — no compile-time safety for API contracts

decision.context: PWA service worker cache regex matched /https:\/\/api\./ but API calls are relative
decision.decision: Change regex to /^\/api\// to match relative paths
decision.rationale: PWA cache never triggered because URLs are relative to the same origin

decision.context: Sourcemaps enabled in production build
decision.decision: Disable sourcemaps (sourcemap: false)
decision.rationale: Production sourcemaps expose source code to anyone who inspects the browser

decision.context: i18next escapeValue set to false, allowing HTML injection via translations
decision.decision: Set escapeValue: true to prevent XSS through translation strings
decision.rationale: Unescaped translations are an XSS vector if any translation contains HTML

decision.context: Admin frontend had no refresh token interceptor — 401 redirected immediately to login
decision.decision: Add refresh token interceptor mirroring user frontend pattern
decision.rationale: Admin sessions should not drop on access token expiry if refresh token is still valid

decision.context: Re-deploy regenerated WG keys, breaking existing client connections
decision.decision: Add if-not-exists checks before key generation to preserve existing keys
decision.rationale: Idempotent deploys must not regenerate cryptographic material

decision.context: No rollback mechanism — failed deploy leaves system in unknown state
decision.decision: Create deploy/rollback.sh with backup/restore/list commands
decision.rationale: Operational safety requires ability to revert to last known good state

decision.context: Only 3 of 6 services had healthchecks in docker-compose
decision.decision: Add healthchecks for nginx, frontend, frontend-admin with condition: service_healthy
decision.rationale: Depends_on without health checks means nginx may start before backend is ready

decision.context: No resource limits on containers — single container could consume all host memory
decision.decision: Add deploy.resources.limits to all services (backend 512M, frontend 128M, etc.)
decision.rationale: Unbounded containers can cause OOM kills affecting all services

decision.context: iptables MASQUERADE hardcoded to eth0 interface
decision.decision: Use dynamic interface detection: ip route | grep default | awk '{print $5}'
decision.rationale: Servers use various interface names (ens3, eth1, enp0s3) — hardcoded eth0 breaks routing

decision.context: Nginx had no security headers
decision.decision: Add HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, CSP, Referrer-Policy
decision.rationale: Missing headers enable clickjacking, MIME sniffing, and protocol downgrade attacks

decision.context: No rate limiting on nginx — login endpoint vulnerable to brute force
decision.decision: Add limit_req_zone: 5r/m for login, 30r/m for general API
decision.rationale: Unlimited request rates enable credential stuffing and API abuse

decision.context: No database backup strategy
decision.decision: Create deploy/backup-db.sh with pg_dump, 7-backup retention, cron-friendly
decision.rationale: Production data without backups is a single point of failure

decision.context: UFW default allow FORWARD accepted all forwarded traffic
decision.decision: Change to default deny FORWARD + explicit allow on awg0 and awg-client interfaces
decision.rationale: Open FORWARD policy allows any container to route traffic through the host

decision.context: core/security.py had zero test coverage
decision.decision: Create test_security.py with 10 tests covering JWT, password hashing, Fernet, blacklist
decision.rationale: Security module without tests cannot be trusted during refactoring

decision.context: No tests for subscription expiry, scheduler, referrals
decision.decision: Create test_scheduler.py (4 tests), test_referrals.py (7 tests)
decision.rationale: Background tasks and referral logic are business-critical and untested

decision.context: No coverage threshold configured
decision.decision: Add --cov=app --cov-fail-under=70 to pytest addopts
decision.rationale: Without a floor, coverage can silently regress to zero

decision.context: No CI/CD pipeline — no automated checks on push or PR
decision.decision: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with lint, test, and build jobs
decision.rationale: Manual testing does not scale and allows regressions into main

decision.context: conftest.py had duplicated fixtures
decision.decision: Remove duplicates, add proper async session fixture, consolidate 7 shared fixtures
decision.rationale: Duplicated fixtures cause confusion and inconsistent test behavior

decision.context: vpn/service.py was 1112 lines
decision.decision: Split into service.py (403), provisioning.py (211), config.py (59), topology.py (316)
decision.rationale: Files over 500 lines are hard to review, test, and maintain

decision.context: UserResponse manually constructed in 4 places in router.py
decision.decision: Add UserResponse.from_user() classmethod factory
decision.rationale: DRY — single source of truth for user serialization shape

decision.context: No audit trail for admin actions
decision.decision: Create AdminAuditEvent model and AdminAuditMiddleware for /api/v1/admin/* requests
decision.rationale: Admin actions without audit trail cannot be investigated after incidents

decision.context: Empty app/email/ module with 0-byte __init__.py
decision.decision: Delete the directory, mark SMTP settings as reserved for future use
decision.rationale: Dead code confuses onboarding and suggests incomplete features

decision.context: Dead App.tsx in admin frontend (return null)
decision.decision: Delete the file, remove import from main.tsx
decision.rationale: Dead files increase cognitive load and bundle size

decision.context: All API routes used /api prefix without versioning
decision.decision: Migrate all routers to /api/v1 prefix
decision.rationale: API versioning enables backward-compatible breaking changes in the future

decision.context: Referral URL hardcoded as https://krotpn.com/register?ref=
decision.decision: Add frontend_url to Settings, use settings.frontend_url in referral links
decision.rationale: Hardcoded URLs prevent staging/testing environments from working correctly
